changes: Added post-scan actions — fill fields automatically after each tab is scanned
Added startup config restore if localStorage is wiped
Added cross-browser config sync via linked backup file
Added GitHub update check with cumulative changelog
Fixed warn message condition parsing (field keys with :: no longer break conditions)
Added TT (uppercase only) and training (case-insensitive) keyword support
Added Variables feature — define computed values using field/table data
Variables can be shown inline in group field rows
Added variable display in group header messages
Fixed sel.onchange missing bug in Setup > Groups field row editor
Added Row Detail Fields — collect data from expanded row panels during scan
Added dismissible dialog support for Downtime scan step
Added varFields section in groups for variable display
